title: Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Undesignated Temporary Financial Assistance * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disabilities Issues LGBTQ2+ Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY KEN WONDERLY MEMORIAL FUND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A memorial fund that provides emergency financial assistance to those in urgent need of money to pay for such things as travel for a critical medical need, electricity, phone, rent, etc. 311 S Holly Street Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Must have an intellectual and/or developmental disability or be the parent or guardian of person with an intellectual and/or developmental disability who is living in the home Hours: Tuesday-Friday 10:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 283-3056 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE ARC JACKSON COUNTY KEN WONDERLY MEMORIAL FUND
